item_specifications.special_feature: Constructed of Steel Wire, Large Top, Lockable, Steel and Wood Combination

about_item: Multifunctional Use: This steel and wood combination dog crate can be used as a dog crate and as a side table.

Double Door Design: This furniture style dog crate includes two open doors (side door and front door), which is easy for pets to enter and exit and clean the dog cage. It has locked latches and prevents the dog from escaping.
Ample Space: This dog kennel furniture features a large wooden top so you can place your books, plants, remotes, or decorations on top.
Solid Construction: Sturdy MDF and steel tube fence form a robust structure for daily use. This dog crate table is sturdy enough for small and medium-sized dogs up to 33 lbs.
Wood Dog Crate Information: Overall Dimensions: 32.75" L x 21.75" W x 23.5" H. Interior Dimensions: 30.75" L x 20" W x 21.75" H. Assembly required.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate easy to assemble and appreciate its appearance, with one mentioning it's nice enough to keep in the living room. The crate receives positive feedback for its quality and sturdiness.

authors_reviews.title: Beautiful and Modern Cage!!!
authors_reviews.text: Beautiful cage! I went looking for a cage that was modern looking and uniquely designed and this fit perfect! I have an 11lb shitzu that gets very anxious when I leave and can be destructive. I’m hoping this cage does the job to keep her in control.It took about 1.5 hours to put up and it was fairly easy with the instructions provided!
authors_reviews.author: Bobbi

authors_reviews.title: Crate
authors_reviews.text: Very sturdy and smart looking the dark gray color is very attractive
authors_reviews.author: remy

authors_reviews.title: Great price great quality
authors_reviews.text: Super easy to assemble great quality! Our dog loves it.
authors_reviews.author: Megan Emery

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy and attractive
authors_reviews.text: Sturdy, attractive and perfect for my Corgi!Wish it was preassembled.
authors_reviews.author: angelem

authors_reviews.title: It took a hour to put this together. I was expecting it to be 2 minutes like most other crates.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: So functional
authors_reviews.text: I was sick of looking at a metal cage in my living room for my dogs, just looked tacky. I came across this dog bed/table and I knew this would solve my problem. No problems assembling and it has worked perfectly. I was hoping the space that I wanted to put it in the door would close. It has two doors that lock but because of where I put it I can’t lock it. This is not the fault of the company it’s just where it fit in my living room. I did have an issue I contacted the company and it was immediately resolved. I highly recommend this product and working with this company.
authors_reviews.author: BC

authors_reviews.title: Looks good
authors_reviews.text: I did receive the dog crate, but I’m waiting till I can find the right place to put it so I really haven’t taken it out of the box and put it together yet. Although it was packaged very nicely and came on time, I will probably write another review after I get it up and around, but everything so far looks good and through the advertisement of it it looks like a very nice crate.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Size
authors_reviews.text: We got this for our one year old corgi whom is crate trained to sleep in it at night. It was very easy to put together, and is sturdy. We love it!
authors_reviews.author: Donna
